'''Naktu Jeera''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] working for [[Longo Two-Guns]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Jeera was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for ambushing a convoy of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] that were en'route to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. He was caught by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty just after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
